ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Electronics Mart India Limited (EMIL) announced the commencement of commercial operations for a new 6,500 sq ft 'BAJAJ ELECTRONICS' multi-brand store in Andhra Pradesh, effective July 10, 2026. This disclosure signifies a routine business expansion, contributing to the company's retail footprint and potential revenue growth in the region. No red flags or material adverse impacts are identified in this standard operational update.
